syntax.justification: Partial formalization in 40_formalization_expansion.json. No formal grammar. Natural language base.

semantics.justification: 5/8 key terms have stable operational semantics. CIRC-001 and CIRC-005 are significant penalties.

axiom_quality.justification: Best dimension. Named, finite, mostly independent. Natural language form is the only gap.

inference_rules.justification: 4 standard rules used but never stated. 2 non-standard rules required. None formally specified.

proof_calculus.justification: No proof calculus. 8 informal proof sketches are proto-proofs. This is the largest gap.

formalizability.justification: Kernel is 92% expressible. Only 0.2% of full claim set formalized. 4 logic types covered but only sketched.

machine_verifiability.justification: Not verifiable today. 5 propositional claims could be verified. Full verification: 150-300 hours away.

model_theory_readiness.justification: M1 (Islamic model) satisfies all axioms. M2 (secular reinterpretation) partial. No categoricity proof.

arithmetic_expressiveness.justification: No arithmetic encoding. This is the hard blocker for Gödel analysis.
